extraction.one_line_summary: DE GENDT Thomas attacked from early breakaway on penultimate Katschberg lap, dropped DOMONT Axel on final Katschberg ascent to solo to victory.
tactical_patterns: DE GENDT Thomas targeted polka dots via early break on stage with 30km ascending, then converted to stage win.
AG2R placed DOMONT Axel breakaway, LATOUR Pierre counterattack descent for top-five insurance on lumpy opener.
DIMENSION DATA paced peloton for BOASSON HAGEN but tempo eliminated pure sprinters without catching quality climber breakaway.

rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: positive: dominated stage with 30km ascending total, shed DOMONT on final Katschberg pass showing excellent climbing form
rider_signals.DOMONT Axel: positive: lasted to final climb in winning break, took second on lumpy opener indicating strong early-race legs
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: positive: attacked final descent from peloton for fourth, showing opportunism and descending courage
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: neutral: team chased but peloton pace insufficient to catch breakaway on lumpy profile
rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: negative: eliminated by DIMENSION DATA tempo before finale, confirming pure sprinters cannot survive 30km ascending
rider_signals.BOUHANNI Nacer: negative: dropped by peloton pace before finale on lumpy stage with substantial climbing
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: shed by tempo on stage with 30km ascending, signaling vulnerability on even moderately hilly profiles
